scripts.test: npx playwright test && npx playwright show-report --export=combined-report.html
scripts.preclear: node -e "import fs from 'fs'; const d='auth/sso-session'; fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true}); console.log('Session cleared');"
scripts.test:chatai: npm run preclear && npx playwright test tests/ui/00-Login.spec.js tests/ui/06-PlatformSD.spec.js tests/ui/07-KnowledgeManager.spec.js tests/ui/08-SmartConversionAdvisory.spec.js --reporter=list,./reporters/extent-reporter.js
scripts.test:voiceai: npm run preclear && npx playwright test tests/ui/00-Login.spec.js tests/ui/05-Platform.spec.js --reporter=list,./reporters/extent-reporter.js
